title: Purely Performant
description: The modpack purely packed with performance and quality-of-life in range of your mouse.
body:
#
Purely Performant
**Purely Performant** is a modpack that aims to increase Your framerate with best optimization mods available in the modding community and enhance Your gameplay by a few quality of life mods that every player would require to play with. **Hope you will have fun there! Enjoy!**

Performance

The modpack is using modern mods like Sodium, Lithium, More Culling and others. It is proven that such mods are increasing performance of the game as well as reducing resource usage on Your computer.

Compatibility

Bundled mods inside of the modpack are mostly client-sided and are not interfering with the compatibility with regular vanilla servers that players would eventually play on.

Controller Support

Yes, You heard right, controller is supported in this modpack. So grab your controller and enjoy your game playing with it!

Customizable LAN

Isn't that great to have such mod to change options of your LAN? Something that people need to host customized local or public world for their friends! Including e4mc mod!

Get Your Hands On Optimized Java 17-2X Arguments

```java -XX:+UnlockExperimentalVMOptions -XX:+UseG1GC -Dsun.rmi.dgc.server.gcInterval=3600000 -XX:G1NewSizePercent=20 -XX:G1ReservePercent=20 -XX:MaxGCPauseMillis=50 -XX:G1HeapRegionSize=32M ```

Versioning

Modpack version format [mc version]-v[X].[Y]

- The X means a major version, it's changed when modpack is fully remade. (ex. 1.0->2.0)

- The Y is version of updates when mods or configs are added into modpack.

Disclaimer! Some of the mods from modern versions are not available on older versions!
